programs.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programs.desc: Comedy-drama series. When the Magnificent Seven are forced to camp out in Thornley Manor, Wayne is given the cold shoulder and must work to regain his popularity.

programs.title: Lost
programs.desc: Jack tends to a severely wounded Boone after Locke returns him to the caves. In the confusion, Locke slips away to deal with his guilt over the crisis.

programs.title: The Sweeney
programs.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and his team search for a family held hostage while the father of the clan is forced to help a multi-million-dollar fraud.

programs.title: Minder
programs.desc: The Loneliness of the Long Distance Entrepreneur: Comedy-drama series. When Terry goes missing, Arthur Daley returns with a new minder - his nephew - and plans to move into Europe.

programs.title: Auto Mundial
programs.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
